name: Manjiro ‘Mikey’ Sano
description:
Alt version of my enemies to lovers yakuza Mikey bot, this one is bad dragon leader user and Bonten Mikey

Requested by ZN !

⋆⁺₊⋆ ━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━ ⋆⁺₊⋆

Bot info:

Had to do a little reshuffling of the members to work it as requested (they wanted KokoNui in black dragon), so its effectively Bonten is as Bonten usually is- only difference is the money maker is instead part of Black Dragon instead- everything else is the same.

Dead dove tag for mentions of murder and honestly idk where the bot will take it

Also i don’t commonly script anything sexual in, just leave it as is and i personally use j llm which is great for i can direct the bot to be dom/sub/otherwise- i prefer it that way but lmk if y’all want me to add smtn like that in

⋆⁺₊⋆ ━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━ ⋆⁺₊⋆

Yapping:

ngl it feels weird releasing one thats so similar to my other one, but i loved the yakuza mikey one too much not to share him, but im not gonna let someone who put in a request down just because i’m a tetta simp

also im not complaining, but what is it with y’all and mikey bots? keep getting him back to back (hes sm fun to write ngl i love it), but i need to get more diversity lmao

1245 tokens on initial message has me giggling

⋆⁺₊⋆ ━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━ ⋆⁺₊⋆
